/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/graph_vis.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/graph_vis.dir/src/Graph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/graph_vis.dir/src/Config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/graph_vis.dir/src/LayoutEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/graph_vis.dir/src/SvgRenderer.cpp.o -o graph_vis
